steps.title: Identify the difference to emphasize
steps.content: The student must emphasize a difference between the two supercontinents. The notes provide one clear distinction: formation time—Ur formed 3.1 billion years ago, Euramerica 300 million years ago.

steps.title: Match the goal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A presents both supercontinents and uses “but” and “much earlier” to emphasize the formation-time difference.

Choices B and C describe supercontinents in general or focus on similarities; choice D mentions only Ur, making comparison impossible.

By contrasting when each supercontinent formed, A directly emphasizes a concrete difference between the two.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
